coreJobStatement: Design, manufacture, calibrate, and deliver instruments that measure, display, and control industrial process variables to enable safe, efficient, and compliant operation of process plants
outputTypes: Flow instruments (ultrasonic, electromagnetic, Coriolis, vortex, turbine, differential-pressure, thermal mass)
hierarchy: Process VN (L7 through L4) — what process steps and equipment compose the instrument manufacturing chain
marketSize: ~$8.5–9.1B globally (flow meters, 2024–2025); ~$0.8–1.3B ultrasonic flowmeter segment; transit-time = 80–85% of ultrasonic [SRC: web_search]

l6Systems.name: Product Design & Engineering
l6Systems.jobFamily: Define measurement principle, mechanical form, electronics architecture, and firmware for target process variable

l6Systems.name: Sensor & Transducer Fabrication
l6Systems.jobFamily: Manufacture the primary sensing element that converts a physical variable into an electrical signal

l6Systems.name: Electronics Manufacturing
l6Systems.jobFamily: Fabricate, populate, and test printed circuit boards with signal conditioning, digitisation, and communication firmware

l6Systems.name: Flow Body & Housing Fabrication
l6Systems.jobFamily: Machine, cast, or mold the wetted and structural housings that contain sensor and electronics

l6Systems.name: Assembly & Integration
l6Systems.jobFamily: Combine sensor, electronics, and housing into a finished instrument; seal, wire, and verify

l6Systems.name: Calibration & Testing
l6Systems.jobFamily: Calibrate each instrument against a traceable reference and verify performance across environmental and endurance envelopes

l6Systems.name: Packaging & Dispatch
l6Systems.jobFamily: Inspect, document, pack, and ship finished instruments to OEMs, distributors, or end-users

l6Systems.name: Quality Management & Metrology (H)
l6Systems.jobFamily: Maintain measurement traceability, ISO 9001 / ISO 17025 compliance, and process control across all core steps

l6Systems.name: Supply Chain & Procurement (H)
l6Systems.jobFamily: Source raw materials, electronic components, piezo ceramics, metals, polymers, and manage vendor qualification

l6Systems.name: Regulatory & Certification (H)
l6Systems.jobFamily: Obtain and maintain CE/UL, ATEX/IECEx, MID billing, food-contact, and drinking-water certifications

vnUnits.name: Mechanical Design (CAD/CAE)
vnUnits.functionalJob: 3D solid modeling and finite-element analysis of flow bodies, housings, and sensor mounting structures. Determines pressure rating, flow path geometry, and material selection.

vnUnits.name: Electronics Design (EDA)
vnUnits.functionalJob: Schematic capture, PCB layout, and circuit simulation for signal conditioning, ADC, microcontroller, and communication interfaces (UART, LIN, 4–20 mA, HART).

vnUnits.name: Firmware & Signal Processing
vnUnits.functionalJob: Embedded firmware development for transit-time measurement, temperature compensation, anomaly detection, and communication protocol stacks.

vnUnits.name: Piezoelectric Transducer Manufacturing
vnUnits.functionalJob: Fabrication of piezoelectric ceramic elements (PZT) for ultrasonic flow sensors. Two matched transducers per sensor body. Critical parameters: resonant frequency matching (±0.5%), acoustic impedance, and aging stability. PI Ceramic and CeramTec are major piezo suppliers; some OEMs fabricate in-house. [SRC: web_search]

vnUnits.name: Electromagnetic Coil Assembly
vnUnits.functionalJob: Winding of excitation and pickup coils for electromagnetic (mag) flowmeters. Coil geometry and insulation quality determine field uniformity and signal-to-noise ratio.

vnUnits.name: Coriolis Tube Fabrication
vnUnits.functionalJob: Precision bending and welding of thin-walled stainless steel tubes (316L) for Coriolis mass flowmeters. Tube geometry (U-tube, straight, dual) determines sensitivity and zero stability.

vnUnits.name: PCB Fabrication & Assembly
vnUnits.functionalJob: Surface-mount technology (SMT) production line. Multi-layer PCBs (4–6 layers typical for flowmeter electronics) with mixed analog/digital layout.

vnUnits.name: Firmware Flashing & Configuration
vnUnits.functionalJob: Programming microcontroller flash memory with production firmware, calibration constants, and customer-specific configuration (pipe diameter, fluid type, communication protocol).

vnUnits.name: Power Supply & Signal Conditioning
vnUnits.functionalJob: Assembly of power management (DC-DC converters, LDOs) and analog front-end modules (charge amplifiers, instrumentation amplifiers, ADC drivers).

vnUnits.name: Metal Flow Body Machining
vnUnits.functionalJob: CNC machining of stainless steel (316L), brass, or Hastelloy flow bodies for industrial and sanitary applications. Process connections (flanged, threaded, tri-clamp) machined to standard dimensions.

vnUnits.name: Polymer Housing Injection Molding
vnUnits.functionalJob: Injection molding of thermoplastic housings (PPS, PA66-GF, PBT) for cost-optimised OEM sensors. Marquardt uses polymer housing for DN12–DN25 variants. [SRC: 01_product_decomposition]

vnUnits.name: Seal & Gasket Manufacturing
vnUnits.functionalJob: Fabrication of elastomeric O-rings, gaskets, and face seals that maintain pressure integrity and media containment. Material selection (EPDM, FKM, FFKM, silicone) matches media compatibility and temperature range.

vnUnits.name: Sensor-to-Body Integration
vnUnits.functionalJob: Bonding or pressing piezoelectric transducers into the flow body; verifying acoustic coupling and signal quality. For ultrasonic sensors, transducer-to-fluid acoustic path integrity determines measurement accuracy.

vnUnits.name: Electronics-to-Housing Integration
vnUnits.functionalJob: Mounting the populated PCB into the electronics housing; connecting sensor leads, power, and communication wiring; potting or conformal coating for environmental protection.

vnUnits.name: Final Assembly & Marking
vnUnits.functionalJob: Mechanical fastening of flow body to electronics housing; product labelling with serial number, calibration data, and regulatory markings.

vnUnits.name: Wet Calibration Rig
vnUnits.functionalJob: Flow calibration against a gravimetric or volumetric reference standard traceable to national metrology institutes (PTB, NIST). Typically 5–10 flow points across the operating range per sensor. [SRC: web_search]

vnUnits.name: Environmental & Endurance Testing
vnUnits.functionalJob: Verification of performance across temperature, pressure, humidity, and mechanical stress envelopes. Ensures sensor meets datasheet specifications under worst-case operating conditions.

vnUnits.name: Electrical Safety & EMC Testing
vnUnits.functionalJob: Hi-pot insulation testing, EMC pre-compliance, and functional verification under electromagnetic interference conditions.

vnUnits.name: Final Inspection & Documentation
vnUnits.functionalJob: Generation of calibration certificates, test reports, and traceability records. Each instrument receives a unique serial number linked to its calibration data.

vnUnits.name: Protective Packaging
vnUnits.functionalJob: Custom packaging protecting instruments during transport. Anti-static packaging for electronics; foam inserts for fragile sensor elements.

vnUnits.name: Warehousing & Logistics
vnUnits.functionalJob: Finished goods storage, order picking, and carrier management for global distribution.

vnUnits.name: Metrology Laboratory
vnUnits.functionalJob: Reference-grade measurement equipment traceable to national standards (PTB, NIST, NPL). Provides calibration references for production rigs and resolves measurement disputes.

vnUnits.name: Quality Management System
vnUnits.functionalJob: Document control, non-conformance tracking, and corrective/preventive action (CAPA) processes. Drives yield improvement and supplier quality management.

vnUnits.name: Incoming Inspection
vnUnits.functionalJob: Verification of incoming raw materials and purchased components against specifications before release to production.

vnUnits.name: Raw Material Procurement
vnUnits.functionalJob: Sourcing of metals, polymers, ceramics, and electronic components. Piezoelectric ceramic supply chain is concentrated (PI Ceramic, CeramTec, TDK/Epcos dominate PZT supply). [SRC: web_search]

vnUnits.name: Vendor Management
vnUnits.functionalJob: Qualification, audit, and performance monitoring of critical suppliers. Dual-sourcing strategy for supply chain resilience.

vnUnits.name: Inventory Management
vnUnits.functionalJob: Storage and replenishment of raw materials and work-in-progress. MRP-driven planning with kanban for high-volume production lines.

vnUnits.name: Product Certification
vnUnits.functionalJob: Obtaining and maintaining mandatory and voluntary product marks that enable market access.

vnUnits.name: Material & Safety Compliance
vnUnits.functionalJob: Ensuring wetted materials meet regulatory requirements for specific end-use environments (food contact, drinking water, pharmaceutical).

vnUnits.name: Export & Trade Compliance
vnUnits.functionalJob: Managing export controls, customs documentation, and country-of-origin requirements for global distribution.
